input_text: The weight of the car is 3 tons. Mary journeyed to the bathroom. Penguins live in water. The street is in Tallinn. Nile's length is 80 kilometers. Mike is male. The letter was written. Frogs are small. Sue is a true patriot. Elephants have long grey trunks. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. If X1 is a father of Y1, Y1 is a child of X1. Agatha is in trouble. The road leading to the village was narrow. Riga is not in Estonia. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. A coffee cup broke. John is an elephant. The hand of a man is nice. Sandra moved to the kitchen. Americans cannot disappear. The tree was cut by the farmer. The student carrying the books greeted the teacher. Sheep are afraid of mice. The picture was painted by Leo. The stone was heavy. Mark is not in the box. Dole was defeated by Clinton. Gertrude is a wolf. Unexpectedly, the door opened. Apparently, Tom left early. A chocolate cake fell. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. Earth contains Europe. Who has a grey trunk?
